creator: hsn@sendmail.cz
text:
- Update to 1.0.2
- Added support for JNA
- Added support for jamm memory agent meter
- forced to use openjdk 1.6
- before shutdown turn off gossip and thrift and make small delay to let
  other nodes to see this node down
- before shutdown call DRAIN. It will flush active memtables

Port maintainer (gslin@gslin.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
